title: Identify performance regression in task planner after recent change
prompt: After a recent refactor of src/agent_runtime/planner.py, planning latency for complex task graphs has increased by 3x. Profile the planner, identify the hot path causing the regression, and propose a targeted fix without changing the public API.

rubric.notes: Performance regression scenario. debug-timeline-capture and regression-audit skills should be triggered. Breadth-first scan is required before depth-dive.
